prompt: A [vernacular architecture type] in [geographic location] — [lens] wide at street or ground level, the [vernacular architecture type] photographed on its own terms rather than as an exotic subject, [local material and construction method] visible and legible in close detail, [human activity] in the frame treating the architecture as ordinary — which it is, [time of day] light the working light of this place, [atmospheric detail] the specific atmosphere of [geographic location], cinematic vernacular architecture still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
